name: Avoma AI Meeting Assistant API
what_it_does: Avoma AI meeting assistant REST API for sales teams, customer success, and revenue operations to automatically record, transcribe, generate AI notes, track action items, and sync meeting insights to CRM with conversation analytics and coaching capabilities. Enables AI agents to manage meeting recording access and retrieval for conversation archive automation, handle AI-generated smart notes and agenda access for meeting documentation automation, access action item extraction and tracking for follow-up automation, retrieve speaker timeline and talk ratio analytics for coaching automation, manage CRM note and deal update sync for revenue workflow automation, handle transcript search and keyword tracking for conversation intelligence automation, access meeting scorecard and coaching feedback for performance automation, retrieve team meeting analytics and trend reporting for RevOps automation, manage integration with Zoom, Google Meet, Teams, and calendar for meeting capture automation, and integrate Avoma with Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, and CRM platforms for end-to-end revenue intelligence workflow.
use_cases: Auto-generating meeting notes from sales call documentation agents
Tracking action items from follow-up automation agents
Syncing meeting insights to CRM from revenue workflow agents
Analyzing sales coaching from team performance agents
not_for: Enterprise-scale revenue intelligence (use Gong or Chorus for large enterprise)
Customer interview research (use UserTesting or Lookback for UX research)
Webinar recording and on-demand content (use Zoom or Riverside for webinars)
best_when: A sales or CS team wanting AI agents to automate meeting note generation, action item tracking, CRM note sync, and coaching analytics through Avoma's AI meeting assistant platform.
avoid_when: MEETING BOT CONSENT AND RECORDING LAWS: Avoma records meetings via bot; automated meeting recording must ensure legal compliance (consent, wiretapping laws by jurisdiction); automated recording in two-party consent states without disclosure creates legal liability. AI NOTE QUALITY FOR DISCOVERY CALLS: Avoma AI note quality depends on speaker audio quality and meeting structure; unstructured discovery calls with multiple speakers produce lower-quality AI notes; automated note generation for early-stage discovery calls may require human review for accuracy. CRM SYNC FIELD MAPPING REQUIRES CONFIGURATION: Avoma CRM sync (Salesforce, HubSpot) requires explicit field mapping configuration in Avoma settings; automated CRM sync without field mapping configuration creates generic note dump rather than structured CRM update; automated CRM field mapping setup requires Avoma admin access.

auth.notes: Avoma uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for integrations. REST API with JSON. Mountain View, California HQ. Founded 2017 by Aditya Kothadiya, Devashish Bhave, and Alok Ramsisaria. Backed by Zoom Ventures, Emergence Capital, Freestyle ($12M+ raised). Products: AI meeting assistant, smart notes, conversation analytics, coaching, CRM sync. Integrations: Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoom, Google Meet, Teams. GDPR. SOC2. Serves sales and CS teams. Competes with Fireflies, Otter.ai, and tl;dv for AI meeting intelligence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan (limited recordings/month, basic AI notes, no CRM sync)
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter ($19/user/mo), Plus ($49/user/mo), Business ($79/user/mo), Enterprise (custom); annual discount
pricing.notes: Mountain View CA. Zoom Ventures backed. Free tier (limited). Per-user subscription. Annual discount.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; recording and note queries throttled; webhooks for recording complete and action item events

known_agent_gotchas: MEETING PROCESSING TIME AFTER RECORDING: Avoma AI note and transcript generation processes after meeting completion (typically 5-30 minutes); automated downstream note sync must poll for processing completion or use webhook; automated immediate note access after meeting end returns empty or processing status

SMART NOTES TEMPLATE DEPENDENCY: Avoma Smart Notes quality depends on configured meeting templates (agenda, note structure); automated note generation without template configuration produces generic notes; automated role-specific note templates (discovery, demo, QBR) must be pre-configured before automated meeting capture

ACTION ITEM EXTRACTION CONFIDENCE THRESHOLD: Avoma action item extraction uses NLP-based detection with confidence scoring; automated action item routing must consider confidence threshold; automated action item sync including low-confidence extractions creates noise in CRM and project management tools

MEETING TYPE ROUTING FOR APPROPRIATE ANALYSIS: Avoma applies different AI analysis for different meeting types (internal vs external, sales vs CS); automated meeting recording must specify meeting type for appropriate analysis model; automated default meeting type creates generic analysis for specialized meeting contexts

OAUTH SCOPE FOR CRM VS MEETING DATA ACCESS: Avoma OAuth scopes separate meeting data access from CRM integration write access; automated workflows needing both meeting access and CRM update must request both scopes; automated CRM update using meeting-read-only scope creates permission denied on CRM write operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Meeting intelligence. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Meeting recording and conversation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Meeting intelligence. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Meeting and conversation data.
